authorizationRequirements: Use an isolated canonical worktree for implementation.

warnings: Confirm the canonical owner seam and review all affected consumers before implementation.
authorizationRequirements: Use an isolated canonical worktree and serialize overlapping shared-seam changes.

warnings: This inspection does not authorize migration execution, direct SQL, repair, backfill, or any database write.
authorizationRequirements: Obtain separate authorization for each database target and mutation step.

warnings: Production access, release actions, and incident mutations require separate explicit authorization.
authorizationRequirements: Verify target identity and obtain step-specific release authorization before any external action.

fallback.warning: No verification rule matched one or more changed paths; the conservative full verification fallback was proposed.

production-write.authorizationRequirement: Explicit authorization for the exact database target and mutation.

deploy.authorizationRequirement: Explicit deployment authorization and verified target identity.

destructive.authorizationRequirement: Explicit authorization for the exact destructive target and mutation.
